ariaSlideAttributes.expected: role="group", aria-roledescription="slide", aria-label="Slide X of Y"
ariaSlideAttributes.notes: Swiper's A11y module is overriding custom aria-label. PHP sets 'Slide 1 of 7' but Swiper changes it to '1 / 7'. Navigation button labels also overridden from 'Previous Item'/'Next Item' to 'Previous slide'/'Next slide'.
ariaSlideAttributes.impact: MEDIUM - Screen reader users will hear different label format, but information is still conveyed
ariaSlideAttributes.recommendation: Either disable Swiper's A11y module or configure it to use custom labels via a11y.slideLabelMessage parameter

ariaNavigationLabels.notes: Swiper A11y module is overriding the custom aria-label attributes set in PHP
ariaNavigationLabels.impact: LOW - Labels are still descriptive and functional
ariaNavigationLabels.recommendation: Configure Swiper A11y module or remove it entirely

ariaPaginationHidden.notes: Pagination correctly hidden from screen readers

modalAriaLabelledby.notes: Modal uses aria-labelledby with sr-only heading as intended

modalHeading.expected: Screen reader only heading with id="testimonial-video-heading"
modalHeading.notes: Heading text is generic 'Video' initially, gets updated with testimonial name on modal open (verified in JS code)

modalInertAttribute.expected: inert attribute on modal when hidden
modalInertAttribute.notes: Modal correctly has inert attribute preventing interaction when closed

slideInertManagement.expected: Off-screen slides have inert attribute when loop mode is disabled
slideInertManagement.actual: 17 of 40 total slides have inert attribute (non-visible slides)
slideInertManagement.notes: Inert management is working correctly. Only visible slides are interactive.
slideInertManagement.details: Total slides: 40, Active slides: 23, Inert slides: 17

rotationControlButton.expected: Rotation control button appears when autoplay is enabled
rotationControlButton.actual: No carousel on test page has autoplay enabled (all data-autoplay="0")
rotationControlButton.notes: Cannot verify rotation control button, aria-live management, or focus-based pause without a carousel that has autoplay enabled
rotationControlButton.recommendation: Create or update a test carousel instance with autoplay enabled to verify this functionality

prefersReducedMotion.expected: Autoplay disabled when user has prefers-reduced-motion set
prefersReducedMotion.notes: Implementation verified in JS code (line 5-14), cannot functionally test without autoplay enabled on test page

focusVisibleStyles.actual: Styles defined in swiper.css: ring-2 ring-white ring-offset-2 ring-offset-charcoal
focusVisibleStyles.notes: CSS rules added as documented in developer output

jsErrors.notes: Page loads and executes without JS errors

tsxPhpSync.expected: TSX and PHP files should be in sync for structural changes
tsxPhpSync.actual: TSX uses FilteredServerSideRender - all rendering is done via PHP
tsxPhpSync.notes: No TSX changes needed as noted in developer output. All changes are in PHP template.

issues.title: Swiper A11y Module Overriding Custom ARIA Labels
issues.description: Swiper's built-in A11y module is overriding the custom aria-label attributes set in the PHP template. Slides show '1 / 7' instead of 'Slide 1 of 7', and navigation buttons show 'Previous slide'/'Next slide' instead of 'Previous Item'/'Next Item'.
issues.impact: Screen reader users will hear different label formats than intended, though the information is still conveyed.
issues.recommendation: Either: (1) Remove A11y from the modules array, OR (2) Configure Swiper's A11y module with custom label messages using the a11y configuration parameter

issues.title: Autoplay Features Not Testable
issues.description: Test page does not have any carousel instances with autoplay enabled, preventing verification of: rotation control button, aria-live management, focus-based pause/resume, and prefers-reduced-motion handling.
issues.impact: Critical accessibility features related to autoplay cannot be functionally verified.
issues.recommendation: Add or modify at least one carousel instance on the test page to enable autoplay (set autoplayCarousel attribute to true) to allow full QA verification

passed: Build status: no new errors or warnings
ARIA slide attributes (role, aria-roledescription) correctly applied
Modal uses aria-labelledby with sr-only heading
Modal has inert attribute when closed
Inert attribute correctly managed on off-screen slides (17/40 slides inert)
No JavaScript errors on page load
TSX/PHP sync maintained (FilteredServerSideRender handles all rendering)

blockers: Swiper A11y module override issue needs to be resolved
Autoplay features need functional testing with enabled autoplay

nextSteps: Developer: Remove Swiper A11y module from modules array OR configure it with custom labels
Developer: Add/enable autoplay on at least one test carousel instance
Functional QA: Re-test after fixes to verify ARIA labels and autoplay features
Design QA: Visual review after functional QA passes
